description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish Docs with AOT that triggers on push with any tag. For the repository owned by ant-design-blazor, set up .NET Core 3.1, 5.0, and 6.0, and Node.js 10.x, then prepare AOT workload, publish docs, and deploy to both Gitee Pages and GitHub Pages. Update version information and sync the repository to Gitee.
